[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001101101 5
1 010010001 3
2 101011101 6
3 011100100 4
4 100100110 4
5 011011111 7
6 111011111 8
7 111111101 8

01 10 111011111 8 match 6
12 21 111011011 7
23 32 111111001 7
34 43 101110011 6
45 54 110110011 6
56 65 110010011 5
67 76 101111111 8
70 07 011111111 8

13 31 101111011 7
24 42 111111011 8
35 53 111100011 6
46 64 100110011 5
57 75 011111111 8
60 06 111011101 7
71 17 101111111 8

03 30 111111101 8 match 7
14 41 100111011 6
25 52 011011011 6
36 63 101110001 5
47 74 101111111 8
50 05 011011111 7 match 5
61 16 100011011 5
72 27 011111111 8

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 110011011 6
26 62 111011001 6
37 73 101111111 8
